summary: Read files with `with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:`. Stream line by line for large files.
oneLineSummary: Always use `with open()` with explicit UTF-8 encoding for safe file reading.
keyTakeaways: Stream line by line for memory efficiency.

nextTopics.title: Writing Files
nextTopics.whyNext: Learn to create and append data to disk files.
